# Crypto libs
cryptography==43.0.3
pycryptodome==3.21.0
pynacl==1.5.0
ecdsa==0.19.0

# Math
sympy==1.13.3
gmpy2==2.2.1
z3-solver==4.13.4.0

# Testing
hypothesis==6.122.3
pytest==8.3.4

# Agent SDKs
anthropic==0.42.0
openai==1.59.3
# Latest available on PyPI as of May 2026. The adapter only forwards
# `model` / `max_budget_usd` to ClaudeAgentOptions when explicitly
# requested via CLI flags, so older versions still work for the
# default flow — but newer versions know more message types
# (e.g. rate_limit_event, which 0.1.0 mis-handles).
claude-agent-sdk==0.1.75

# MCP framework — bumped from 1.2.0 to satisfy claude-agent-sdk 0.1.75's
# mcp>=1.19.0 dependency. Lean MCP server only uses mcp.server.fastmcp,
# whose API is stable across this range.
mcp==1.19.0
